---
name: Bug report
about: The skill produced incorrect, outdated, or missing guidance
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of what the AI assistant did wrong (wrong code, deprecated API, missing step, broken example, etc.).

## How to reproduce

1. AI tool: <!-- Claude Code / Cursor / Copilot / Windsurf / Codex / Gemini / Mistral vibe / other -->
2. Command or trigger: <!-- e.g. /purchasely:integrate ios, or "asked about deeplinks" -->
3. Platform: <!-- iOS / Android / React Native / Flutter / Cordova -->
4. Exact prompt used: <!-- paste it -->

## What you expected

What correct guidance should have looked like.

## Affected file(s)

If you can pinpoint the reference or skill file, link it:

- `skills/...` or `references/...` or `configs/...`

## Additional context

Screenshots of the AI session, SDK version in use, any other relevant info.
